user.title: Intex SX2100 Pool Pump
user.description: Local control requires the device ID, local key and IP address (find them with `tinytuya wizard`). Cloud credentials from iot.tuya.com are optional and only needed for schedule (skdl_filter) support.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the pump. Check the IP address and that the pump is powered.
error.invalid_auth: The pump rejected the local key. Re-check it (it rotates when the device is re-paired in the app).
error.cloud_incomplete: Provide both cloud client ID and secret, or neither.
error.cloud_invalid_auth: Tuya cloud rejected the client ID/secret.
error.cloud_cannot_connect: Could not reach the Tuya cloud.
